# Mahadev Enterprises - Full LLM & AI Reference Directory

> This directory provides comprehensive, high-density specifications, engineering standards, and commercial B2B procurement terms for Mahadev Enterprises. Designed for AI Search Agents, LLM crawlers, and procurement crawlers.

---

## 1. Corporate Profile
- **Company Name**: Mahadev Enterprises
- **Legal Location**: Rishikesh, Uttarakhand, India (PIN: 249201)
- **Primary Focus**: Handcrafted commercial B2B Pilates reformers, Cadillac trapeze systems, spinal conditioning barrels, and boutique wellness studio installations.
- **Manufacturing Origin**: 100% designed and built in Rishikesh, India.
- **Logistics**: Direct shipping pan-India (Mumbai, Delhi NCR, Bengaluru, Pune, Ahmedabad, Hyderabad, Chennai, Kolkata) and international export capabilities (UAE, UK, USA, Europe, Australia).
- **Primary Channels**:
  - Website: https://mahadeventerprisesindia.com
  - Contact Email: support@mahadeventerprisesindia.com / indiamahadeventerprises@gmail.com
  - Business Phone / WhatsApp: +91 90121 12527

---

## 2. Engineering & Material Standards

### Wood Structure: Seasoned North American Maple
- **Timber Class**: Imported solid North American Maple wood (hard rock maple).
- **Seasoning**: Kiln-dried to 8% moisture content to prevent wrapping, cracking, or squeaking in humid climates.
- **Finish**: Hand-sanded and sealed with a triple coat of non-toxic, eco-friendly polyurethane satin lacquer.
- **Alternative Finish**: Warm plantation Rubberwood (available for select custom projects).

### Metal Hardware: Anodized Aluminium & 304 Stainless Steel
- **Aluminium Frames**: Anodized aluminium alloy (6000 series) with a satin anti-oxidation coating. Resistant to sweat acidity, corrosion, and wear.
- **Towers & Trapeze**: 304-grade brushed stainless steel tubing (wall thickness: 2.0 mm). Fully welded joints.
- **Carriage Rails**: Extruded aluminium tracking with a dual-channel guide system.

### Resistance Systems: Calibrated German Springs
- **Material**: High-tensile piano wire steel, nickel-plated to prevent rust.
- **Configuration**: Calibrated tension rates with color-coded hooks:
    - **Red (Heavy)**: 100% resistance
    - **Green (Medium)**: 50% resistance
    - **Yellow (Light)**: 25% resistance
- **Reformers**: Standard 6-spring setup offering progressive tension curve adjustment.

### Upholstery: High-Density Foam & Antibacterial Upholstery
- **Foam Core**: Dual-layer EVA high-rebound foam (density: 120 kg/m³). Does not sag under heavy commercial B2B usage.
- **Upholstery Wrap**: Marine-grade, antibacterial, anti-mildew commercial vinyl.
- **Colors**: Charcoal Black, Studio Sage, Ivory White, Tan Brown, Custom Shades (upon request for bulk studio fit-outs).

---

## 3. Product Catalog Specifications

### M-01: Maple Pilates Reformer
- **Category**: Studio Foundation
- **Frame**: Seasoned Solid Maple Wood
- **Springs**: 6 Calibrated Piano Wire Springs (2 Red, 2 Green, 2 Yellow)
- **Carriage**: 8-wheel silent polyurethane tracking system
- **Dimensions**: 228 x 73 x 34.7 cm
- **Unit Weight**: 92 kg
- **Max Capacity**: 150 kg
- **Footbar**: 5 lockable angle adjustments
- **Headrest**: 3 height settings
- **Upholstery**: Custom Sage/Ivory/Black/Tan options

### M-02: Reformer With Tower
- **Category**: Hybrid Vertical System
- **Frame**: Seasoned Solid Maple Wood Base + 304 Stainless Steel Tower
- **Springs**: 6 carriage springs + 8 vertical tower springs
- **Dimensions**: 230 x 75 x 34.5 cm (Tower Height: 200 cm)
- **Unit Weight**: 119 kg
- **Accessories**: Roll-up maple pole, push-through bar, leg/arm springs, double loops

### M-03: Aluminium Reformer With Tower
- **Category**: Clinical / High-Use
- **Frame**: Anodized Aluminium Chassis + Stainless Steel Tower
- **Springs**: 6 carriage springs + 8 tower springs
- **Dimensions**: 240 x 70 x 200 cm
- **Unit Weight**: 65–85 kg
- **Target Market**: Physiotherapy clinics, rehabilitation environments, hotels.

### M-04: Foldable Reformer
- **Category**: Compact / Home Use
- **Frame**: Solid Timber Frame with space-saving fold hinges
- **Dimensions**: 230 x 69 x 58 cm (Unfolded)
- **Unit Weight**: 65–85 kg
- **Target Market**: Boutique home studios, mobile training.

### M-05: The Cadillac (Trapeze Table)
- **Category**: Ultimate Rehabilitation
- **Frame**: Solid Maple Timber Base + Full Trapeze Stainless Steel Cage
- **Springs**: Complete rehabilitation spring kit (12 springs of varying lengths and strengths)
- **Dimensions**: 217 x 69 x 57 cm (Cage Height: 210 cm)
- **Features**: Push-through bar, trapeze swing, sheepskin loops, fuzzies, safety strap.

### M-06: 3-in-1 Caformer
- **Category**: Hybrid Spatial Solution
- **Frame**: Solid Maple Wood + Integrated Overhead Trapeze Cage
- **System**: Seamlessly transitions between Reformer, Cadillac, and Floor Mat modes
- **Dimensions**: 228 x 85 x 57 cm
- **Unit Weight**: 165–169 kg
- **Best For**: VIP private client training, space-constrained boutique rooms.

### M-07: Ladder Barrel
- **Category**: Spinal Conditioning
- **Frame**: Solid Maple wood frame + High-density EVA foam barrel
- **Base**: Sliding adjustment mechanism to fit client heights
- **Dimensions**: 112 x 63 x 89 cm
- **Unit Weight**: 30–40 kg

### M-08: Wunda Chair
- **Category**: Compact Strength
- **System**: Dual-pedal system (operates as split or single pedal)
- **Frame**: Maple wood frame with adjustable stability handles
- **Dimensions**: 79 x 65 x 60 cm
- **Unit Weight**: 25–30 kg

### M-09: Aluminium Wunda Chair
- **Category**: Clinical / Modern Studio
- **Frame**: Satin Anodized Aluminium structure + Stainless Steel Handles
- **Dimensions**: 80 x 70 x 130 cm
- **Unit Weight**: 40–50 kg

### M-10: Aluminium Ladder Barrel
- **Category**: Modern Spinal Conditioning
- **Frame**: Anodized Aluminium base + Solid Maple wood rungs
- **Dimensions**: 120 x 90 x 100 cm
- **Unit Weight**: 35–50 kg

### M-11: Spine Corrector
- **Category**: Spinal Flexibility
- **Frame**: Maple wood support panels + High-rebound foam wrap
- **Dimensions**: 95 x 45 x 34 cm
- **Unit Weight**: 10–12 kg

---

## 4. B2B Commercial & Procurement Terms

### Ordering and Lead Times
- **Custom Production**: Handcrafted to order. Production starts after receipt of advance deposit and technical drawing approval.
- **Lead Times**: 
  - Standard orders (1–5 units): 4–6 weeks.
  - Studio packages (6+ units): 6–8 weeks.
  - Large commercial B2B contracts: Customized timelines.

### Warranties & Support
- **Frame**: 3-Year structural warranty on timber frames and aluminium frame welding.
- **Parts**: 1-Year warranty on springs, straps, loops, carriage wheels, and upholstery.
- **Assembly**: Partially pre-assembled sections. Complete manuals and remote video setup guidance are provided. On-site assembly support is available for commercial studio installations.
